source_pr.title: *: enable gosimple linter
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: ref #22979 

### What is changed and how it works?

Turn on gosimple linter and fix conflicts.

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: query := "select * from t1 order by id,a,b" (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
failure_signature: query := "select * from t1 order by id,a,b" (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR enables the `gosimple` linter and contains broad mechanical refactors across many files. The presence of a query string in a test file is not a reliable flaky signature or targeted stabilization change. CI failure logs/repro are needed to attribute any flaky behavior to a specific root cause.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: query := "select * from t1 order by id,a,b" (planner/core/partition_pruner_test.go)
